message:
feat(spawn): Implement spawn(), spawn_local(), spawn_blocking() for Scope

Add spawn infrastructure to Scope (src/cx/scope.rs):
- spawn(): General-purpose async task spawning with Send bounds
- spawn_local(): Thread-local tasks (delegates to spawn in Phase 0)
- spawn_blocking(): Wrap blocking closures as async tasks
- create_task_record(): Helper for task registration

Update RuntimeState (src/runtime/state.rs):
- Add stored_futures HashMap for task storage
- Add create_task() for creating tasks with result channels
- Add get_stored_future() and remove_stored_future() accessors

For Phase 0 (single-threaded):
- spawn_local requires Send (true !Send support in Phase 1+)
- spawn_blocking runs inline (proper thread pool in Phase 1+)

Closes asupersync-8z9

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
